dict.string: ChildCare AI uses your camera to capture photos for daily reports, incident logs, and child activity updates.
ChildCare AI needs access to your photo library to attach images to daily reports and incident logs.
ChildCare AI saves photos of your child's activities to your photo library if you choose to do so.
ChildCare AI uses the microphone when recording videos for daily activity reports.
ChildCare AI uses Face ID so you can sign in quickly and securely.
